title: Business Trip Prep 出差准备

lines.en: I need to prepare for the Shanghai trip next Monday.
lines.zh: 我需要准备下周一去上海的出差。

lines.en: Sure. Have you booked the flight and hotel?
lines.zh: 好的。机票和酒店订了吗？

lines.en: Not yet. Can you help me with that?
lines.zh: 还没。你能帮我订一下吗？

lines.en: Of course. What time do you prefer to leave?
The morning flight around 9 AM would be best.
lines.zh: 早上9点左右的航班最好。

lines.en: Got it. And for the hotel, near the client's office?
lines.zh: 明白。酒店要订在客户办公室附近吗？

lines.en: Yes, that would be more convenient.
I will also print the meeting agenda and materials.
lines.zh: 我还会把会议议程和资料打印出来。

lines.en: Perfect. Please send me the itinerary once it is ready.
lines.zh: 太好了。准备好后请把行程发给我。
